home.desc: Connecting farmers, harvest managers, labours, and factories into one unified platform — from request to coordination.
home.descRoles: Role-based dashboards and features designed for farmers, labours, harvest managers, and factories to manage their activities efficiently.
home.descFeatures: Designed to simplify coordination between farmers, labours, harvest managers, and factories.
home.regToday: Register today — available for all users. Simple onboarding with quick access to the platform.
home.noComplex: No complex setup required · Simple web-based access for all users

auth.loginDesc: Sign in to manage requests, track activities, coordinate tasks, and handle operations — all in one place.
auth.signupDesc: From request submission to task completion — one platform connects farmers, labours, harvest managers, and factories in a single workflow.

footer.canesetuDesc: A unified digital platform connecting farmers, labours, harvest managers, and factories.

farmerDash.sub: Manage your farm activities, track job requests, and stay updated with the latest alerts.

farmerContracts.emptyNoRequests: You haven't sent any job requests yet. Visit an HHM's profile to send your first request!
farmerContracts.emptyFilter: No requests match your current filter.
farmerContracts.msgAccepted: Great! This HHM has accepted your job request. You can expect them to contact you soon.
farmerContracts.msgCancelled: This request was automatically cancelled because another HHM accepted a different request from you.
farmerContracts.msgRejected: Unfortunately, this HHM couldn't take on your job request. You can send requests to other HHMs.
farmerContracts.msgPending1: Waiting for HHM response. They have
farmerContracts.noNewNotifs: No new notifications at the moment.

homeHow.sub: One connected flow that eliminates paperwork, reduces delays, and ensures fair compensation at every step.
homeHow.step1Desc: All users — Farmers, Workers, Harvest Managers (HHM), and Factories — register and log in to the system using role-based access.
homeHow.step2Desc: Farmers submit requests to harvest managers for harvesting activities and can also view past records and factory updates.
homeHow.step3Desc: Harvest managers receive farmer requests, accept or reject them, hire workers, assign tasks, and manage the harvesting process.
homeHow.step4Desc: Workers view job opportunities, accept or reject job requests, update availability, and perform assigned tasks while tracking their work and wages.
homeHow.step5Desc: Factories receive contract requests from harvest managers, approve or reject them, and post announcements related to supply and operations.
homeHow.step6Desc: The system maintains records of requests, tasks, job history, and basic payment/wage information in a centralized database for all users.

homeRolesGrid.farmerDesc: Farmers can manage their harvesting activities digitally by sending requests, tracking work progress, and accessing important updates from factories.
homeRolesGrid.hhmDesc: Harvest Managers act as the central coordinators between farmers, workers, and factories by managing requests, assigning tasks, and tracking work progress.
homeRolesGrid.labourDesc: Workers can find job opportunities, respond to hiring requests, and maintain records of their work and wages.
homeRolesGrid.factoryDesc: Factories manage contract approvals, publish announcements, and maintain supply-related information in the system.

homeFeatGrid.feat1Desc: Receive instant alerts and updates for every single transaction across the platform. Stay completely informed at every step without relying on complex IoT setups.
homeFeatGrid.feat2Desc: Centralized storage of requests, work history, and basic wage details. Ensures transparency and easy access to all operational records.
homeFeatGrid.feat3Desc: Structured tracking of requests, tasks, and work history across farmers, workers, and managers for better coordination and visibility.
homeFeatGrid.feat4Desc: Hyperlocal weather data integrated with harvest scheduling to reduce field losses during rain events.
homeFeatGrid.feat5Desc: Fully optimized for mobile devices so you can manage your operations on the go. Available in Marathi, Hindi, and English.
homeFeatGrid.feat6Desc: Reliable role-based access with structured user login system. Ensures safe data handling across all stakeholders.

marketplace.sub: Direct trade platform for premium sugarcane and seeds.
marketplace.searchingDeals: Searching for the best sugarcane deals...
marketplace.beFirstList: Be the first to list your sugarcane crop and connect with buyers!
